query:
SELECT 
  vm.id,
  vm.variantId,
  vm.materialColorId,
  vm.materialType,
  vm.sortOrder,
  mc.colorName,
  mc.colorCode
FROM variant_materials vm
LEFT JOIN material_colors mc ON vm.materialColorId = mc.id
WHERE vm.variantId = 390002
ORDER BY vm.sortOrder;
